name: concept-workflow
tagline: Orchestrates five sub-skills to research, write, test, fact-check, and SEO-optimize a JS concept page end to end.
verdict: Well-scoped orchestrator with strong negative-triggers and output templates, and no security concerns. Structural weaknesses: oversized SKILL.md that should push templates to references, an undeclared category-selection fork, and no version/changelog signal.

highlights.summary: Description says what it orchestrates but never states when to invoke it.
Quality gates block progression but no explicit corrective action is given when a gate fails (e.g. failing tests).
514-line SKILL.md inlines full checklist and report templates that could split into references.
